courses.description: Learn reinforcement learning through the lens of film direction. Navigate a scenario-based course where your choices about exploration versus exploitation shape both your film and your understanding of how learning agents make decisions.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning through Architecture
courses.description: Master reinforcement learning concepts by designing and optimizing buildings and urban spaces

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning: Building Your First Agent
courses.description: Learn RL through a scenario-based approach where you design an agent to control a robot arm. Your choices lead to different learning outcomes.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning Fundamentals
courses.description: Master the core concepts of reinforcement learning through interactive examples and assessments.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning Through Culinary Arts
courses.description: Master reinforcement learning by exploring how chefs learn, refine recipes, and innovate. This branching course covers policy development, reward shaping, and the exploration-exploitation trade-off through culinary examples.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning in Education Technology
courses.description: Master reinforcement learning through its applications in adaptive learning platforms, intelligent tutoring systems, and personalized education.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning for Environmental Science
courses.description: Learn reinforcement learning through real environmental management scenarios, from basic concepts to advanced optimization techniques.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning in Forensic Science
courses.description: Master how investigators and AI systems learn from evidence feedback through Reinforcement Learning, with assessment-driven adaptive learning paths.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning in Healthcare
courses.description: Master reinforcement learning fundamentals through sequential modules in clinical decision-making, with loops for practice and retry.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning Through Marine Biology
courses.description: Explore core RL concepts—agents, environments, rewards, and exploration-exploitation tradeoffs—through the lens of marine animal behavior and ocean ecology.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning in Music Therapy
courses.description: A diagnostic branching course on Reinforcement Learning through the lens of music therapy interventions

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning in Social Work Practice
courses.description: Explore how reinforcement learning principles apply to real social work scenarios through trial-and-error learning, exploration-exploitation balance, and reward system design.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning for Urban Planning
courses.description: Master reinforcement learning through practical urban planning applications and challenges

courses.title: Introduction to Robotics: A Music Therapy Perspective
courses.description: Learn robotics fundamentals through the lens of music therapy. Choose your path: master the mechanics of therapeutic robots, or understand the human-centered design that creates emotional breakthroughs.

courses.title: Probability Theory in Game Design: Mastering Randomness
courses.description: Learn probability theory and random variables through a branching narrative where you balance a roguelike dungeon crawler. Your choices about loot distribution and combat variance lead to success or failure based on understanding discrete and continuous random variables.

courses.title: Introduction to Rust Programming: Environmental Science Edition
courses.description: Learn Rust fundamentals through environmental science applications and sustainability contexts

courses.title: Introduction to Rust Programming
courses.description: Learn Rust fundamentals through building a game engine. Choose your specialization and experience different outcomes based on your architectural decisions in a game development scenario.

courses.title: Introduction to Rust Programming for Healthcare Systems
courses.description: Learn Rust programming fundamentals through healthcare system design, from memory safety principles to building your first patient monitoring application.

courses.title: Introduction to Rust Programming: Building Safer Systems
courses.description: Learn Rust through architectural design scenarios. Guide a smart building system design through critical decisions that determine safety, performance, and long-term success.

courses.title: Introduction to Rust Programming for Social Work Systems
courses.description: Learn Rust fundamentals through building secure, reliable systems for social work case management and client data protection.

courses.title: Sample Branching Course
courses.description: A demo course with branching paths.

courses.title: 🌟 The Quantum Detective — A Feature Showcase Adventure
courses.description: An interactive mystery-adventure that showcases every feature of the branching course system: decisions, assessments, random events, weighted outcomes, conditions, gates, attributes, and variables. Solve the quantum mystery using science, intuition, and luck!

courses.title: The Science of Decision Making: A Complete Interactive Experience
courses.description: A spectacular showcase course demonstrating every feature of the branching course system — decisions, randomness, weighted outcomes, gates, conditions, attributes, assessments, and multiple endings. Learn how humans make decisions while experiencing an interactive adventure.

courses.title: The Art of Problem Solving: A Branching Adventure
courses.description: A spectacular showcase course demonstrating every feature of the branching course system: attributes, variables, random events, weighted outcomes, conditions, gates, assessments, practice quizzes, and multiple endings.

courses.title: Signal Processing Fundamentals
courses.description: Master signal processing through culinary applications - learn how professional chefs intuitively apply Fourier analysis, filtering, and sampling theory to perfect their craft.

courses.title: Signal Processing Fundamentals: Forensic Investigation
courses.description: Learn signal processing concepts through crime scene analysis scenarios. Use real signal processing techniques to solve forensic cases.

courses.title: Signal Processing Fundamentals for Social Work
courses.description: Learn to identify patterns, filter noise, and interpret data signals in social work practice through a mastery-based learning pathway.

courses.title: Signal Processing Fundamentals: A Healthcare Perspective
courses.description: Master signal processing through real-world healthcare monitoring and diagnostic scenarios. From ECG electrodes to advanced artifact detection, learn why filtering matters in patient care.

courses.title: Digital Electronics in Sports Analytics
courses.description: Master digital electronics concepts through real-world sports analytics applications, from fundamental signals to advanced logic systems

courses.title: Statistical Inference and Hypothesis Testing in Journalism
courses.description: Learn to verify claims and interpret data like a professional journalist using statistical inference and hypothesis testing

courses.title: Statistical Inference and Hypothesis Testing in Sports Analytics
courses.description: Master the fundamental concepts of statistical inference and hypothesis testing through real-world sports analytics scenarios. Choose between learning theory first or diving into practical applications.

courses.title: Statistical Inference and Hypothesis Testing in Marine Biology
courses.description: Master hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, and p-values through real marine biology examples including kelp forests, fish populations, and ocean conservation.

courses.title: Time Series Analysis Fundamentals
courses.description: Master essential time series concepts through sequential learning with adaptive feedback loops

courses.title: Time Series Analysis for Film Production
courses.description: Master time series analysis through the lens of film box office performance, audience engagement, and production decisions. Learn forecasting and analysis techniques by solving real film industry challenges.

courses.title: Time Series Analysis for Social Workers
courses.description: Learn to analyze trends and patterns in client data to improve program delivery and outcomes

courses.title: Time Series Analysis in Environmental Science
courses.description: Learn time series analysis through the lens of environmental monitoring, climate data, and ecological trends.

courses.title: Time Series Analysis for Healthcare
courses.description: Master time series analysis through a healthcare lens, choosing between statistical foundations or hands-on pattern recognition

courses.title: Time Series Analysis for Urban Planners
courses.description: Master time series analysis techniques through real urban planning scenarios. Learn to analyze temporal patterns, forecast city trends, and detect system anomalies.

courses.title: Computer Architecture Through Urban Planning
courses.description: Learn how computer processors, memory, and data flow work by exploring a thriving city's administrative systems.

courses.title: Data Visualization with Python for Urban Planners
courses.description: Learn to create compelling statistical and interactive visualizations of urban data using Python. Understand which visualization technique fits your message, from matplotlib static charts to interactive plotly dashboards.

courses.title: Graph Theory and Urban Planning: MetroCity Redesign
courses.description: Learn graph theory fundamentals by solving real urban planning challenges in MetroCity

courses.title: Signal Processing Fundamentals: Urban Planning Edition
courses.description: Learn signal processing through urban planning scenarios. Explore how cities use sensor data to optimize traffic, reduce noise pollution, and improve livability. Choose between theory-first and practical-first approaches, then see how your decisions impact real city outcomes.

courses.title: Bayesian Statistics in Game Design
courses.description: Master Bayesian reasoning for game balance through three key concepts: priors, likelihood, and posterior updates. Learn to make data-driven balance decisions in interactive game design.

courses.title: Bayesian Statistics Through Marine Biology
courses.description: Learn Bayesian statistical reasoning through realistic marine biology scenarios and conservation decisions

courses.title: Biostatistics for Clinical Research: Game Design Edition
courses.description: Master biostatistical methods for clinical game research through a diagnostic branching course. Learn from real examples in game testing, balance analysis, and player research.

courses.title: Digital Electronics for Smart Buildings
courses.description: Learn digital electronics fundamentals through designing an intelligent building automation system. Choose your design path and navigate the consequences of your architectural decisions.

courses.title: Web Development with FastAPI: The Culinary Kitchen
courses.description: Learn FastAPI through the lens of culinary arts, building restaurant APIs from diagnostic assessment through adaptive learning paths.

courses.title: Human-Computer Interaction: Through Space Exploration
courses.description: Learn HCI principles by designing interfaces for space missions. Master user-centered design and accessibility in extreme environments.

courses.title: Building City APIs with FastAPI
courses.description: Learn FastAPI by building a real-world urban planning application. Navigate through architectural choices and discover how proper design patterns prevent technical debt.

courses.title: Web Development with FastAPI: Building Game Servers
courses.description: Learn FastAPI by building RESTful APIs for game backends. Choose between mastering theory first or jumping straight into hands-on coding.

courses.title: Web Development with FastAPI for Social Work
courses.description: Learn to build modern case management systems using FastAPI, with complete focus on social work applications and real-world scenarios.
